feed.title: JMC-memo
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: my Utils in Deepin 20.x
entry.summary: Status in progress Liste des outils que j’utilise souvent dans mon travail. I add somereferences temporary handel restapi error1, how to add UUID in DB2 and generator 3. entry.title: crontab
entry.summary: Statut non débuté. This post will guide you how to use crontab. Prerequistes Docker installed; docker-compose.yaml version: '3' services: jekyll-serve: image: jekyll/jekyll:4.0 volumes: - '.:/srv/jekyll' ports: - 4000:4000 command: 'jekyll serve' Errors Unable to monitor directories for changes because iNotify max watches exceeded. Run these ...

entry.title: Dockerize MySql
entry.summary: This post will guide you how to dockerize MySql. Prerequistes Docker installed; docker-compose.yaml version: '3' services: db: image: mysql:5.7 environment: - MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=root-password - MYSQL_DATABASE=databasename - MYSQL_USER=user - MYSQL_PASSWORD=user-password # - TZ=Europe/Paris volumes: - ~/datastore/mysql/dbdev:/var/lib/mys...

entry.title: ssh
entry.summary: This post will try to guide you how to troubleshooting ssh in Deepin1. Take a look to tihis video - OpenSSH Full Guide - Everything you need to get started!2. Connect to server via ssh Use this command to log: ssh Username@192.168.2.26 where “Username” is the user name on machine 192.168.2.26. You may need to provide the password for this user during login. jmc@jmc-PC:~$ ssh 192.168.2.26 s...

entry.title: Dockerize an Angular dev environment
entry.summary: This post will guide you how to create an angular dev environment in docker. Contexte Pour ne pas installer sur son poste node, angular etc … Aussi avoir la possibilt/ de travailler avec differentes versions de node et/ou angular Comment en suivant cette source cloner le repos (sinon cr/ere un nouveau avec son seed) verifier Dockerfile et docker-compose.yml workdir ...
